text:
Once upon a time in a small rural town, a wise old owl named Oliver ruled the forestry. He had seen many things pass by his lofty haunt.

One evening, little Max went hiking. He heard stories about owls. Oliver advised him not to get close.

Deep in the forest, Max stumbled upon some old stones. They had owl figures. He whispered.

A giant feather dropped onto his head.

Back home, Max told grandma.

They made owl masks. At night, they heard screeches. They stayed away. The feathers grew. They flew.

Years later, Max flew high. They knew they could do anything.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
